---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality for PACT Passport
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Read this first:** PACT's scope is deliberately small. README §Non-goals lists what is intentionally not in the substrate. Most features belong one layer up (orchestration / application). If you're proposing a substrate-level feature, please explain *why it belongs here* and not in an orchestration layer.

### Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? Concrete scenario, not abstract goal.

### Why current PACT can't support it

What in the current protocol or implementation makes the use case impossible or awkward? Cite specific code paths or spec sections.

### Proposed direction

A sketch of what could change. This does not need to be the final design — it's a starting point for discussion. If there are multiple reasonable approaches, list the trade-offs.

### Why this belongs in the substrate (not one layer up)

Why does this feature need to be at the trust-substrate layer, rather than implemented by an orchestration protocol or application code on top of PACT?

If you can't answer this question crisply, the feature probably belongs one layer up.

### Open design questions

What's unresolved? What would the maintainer need to decide before accepting an implementation?

### Anything else

Related issues, prior art, references to similar designs in other protocols.
